seoTitle: BCSD Calendar 2026-2027 | Bakersfield City School District Dates, Holidays & PDF
seoDescription: BCSD 2026-2027 student calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 26 last day, school holidays, no school days, two-hour delayed starts, Thanksgiving, Winter Break, Spring Break, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Bakersfield City School District lists 180 total school days for 2026-2027. The first day of school is August 12, 2026 and the last day of school is May 26, 2027. Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027. Spring Break runs March 22-26, 2027, followed by a March 29 holiday in lieu of Admission Day. The calendar marks two-hour delayed-start collaboration days on September 10, October 15, November 19, December 10, January 14, February 25, March 11, and May 13. Parent-teacher conference windows run October 19-23, 2026 and March 30-April 2, 2027. May 27 and May 28 are reserved as student attendance days only if needed to maintain 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does BCSD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Bakersfield City School District starts the 2026-2027 school year on Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is BCSD Winter Break in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is BCSD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027. The district also lists Monday, March 29, 2027 as a holiday in lieu of Admission Day.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for BCSD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Wednesday, May 26, 2027. May 27 and May 28 may be used only if additional student attendance days are needed.

calendarFaqs.q: How many days are in the BCSD school year?
calendarFaqs.a: The Bakersfield City School District 2026-2027 calendar includes 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: Does BCSD have school on Friday?
calendarFaqs.a: School attendance depends on the specific Friday. Check the BCSD calendar above for holidays, breaks, minimum days, delayed-start schedules, conference windows, and reserved attendance days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does BCSD Winter Break end?
calendarFaqs.a: BCSD Winter Break ends on Friday, January 1, 2027. Students return Monday, January 4, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the BCSD 2026-2027 PDF calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the PDF link on this page to open the official Bakersfield City School District 2026-2027 calendar PDF. The PDF includes English and Spanish calendar pages, school holidays, delayed starts, minimum days, conference dates, and reporting dates.

customSections.label: BCSD Calendar PDF Guide
customSections.content: The official BCSD calendar PDF is the source document for this page and includes English and Spanish calendar pages, school holidays, delayed-start collaboration days, minimum days, parent-teacher conference dates, reporting dates, and instructional calendar information. Families who need a printable BCSD calendar should use the PDF for a saved copy and verify later changes with the district source.

customSections.label: BCSD Family Planning Guide 2026-2027
customSections.content: Beyond major holidays, BCSD families should watch delayed starts, minimum days, parent-teacher conference windows, and reserved attendance make-up days. Before the first day of school on August 12, 2026, families may want to confirm transportation arrangements, enrollment information, school supply lists, after-school programs, meal program updates, and campus-specific announcements.

customSections.label: BCSD Calendar Updates
customSections.content: Check this page after district calendar revisions, board approvals, or schedule updates. The official BCSD calendar remains the final source for emergency changes, campus-specific updates, delayed starts, minimum days, and reserved attendance make-up days.

customSections.label: BCSD Calendar Review Information
customSections.content: This page was last reviewed on July 22, 2026 against the official Bakersfield City School District 2026-2027 calendar source. MySchoolDates checked the first day, last day, school holidays, two-hour delayed-start days, minimum days, parent-teacher conference windows, reporting dates, reserved attendance make-up days, downloadable files, and official source links.

customSections.label: How This BCSD Calendar Was Prepared
customSections.content: This BCSD calendar page is prepared from the district's published school calendar documents. MySchoolDates extracts and reviews first and last student days, holidays and break periods, delayed starts, minimum days, conference windows, reporting dates, reserved attendance days, and downloadable calendar files. Calendar records are maintained by the MySchoolDates Calendar Data Team, and dates are checked against the official district source before publication.

yearNumbers.label: Delayed Starts
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar marks eight two-hour delayed-start collaboration days.

yearNumbers.label: Conference Windows
yearNumbers.detail: Parent-teacher conference windows are listed in October and March.

yearNumbers.label: Reserved Days
yearNumbers.detail: May 27-28 are reserved as student attendance days only if needed.
